title: Jade Cong (quiz)
description: Test your knowledge of the Jade Cong.

assessment_items.question_content:
**Which technique was used to create this jade cong?**

![](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/d64c3f821eea405521ae14cfb2b0b001.jpeg)

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints: Modeling refers to an additive sculptural technique using clay, mud, or other soft material.
The Lianghzu had no harder stones or tools to carve true jade, so artists used sand to abrade the jade to create surface decoration on the cong.

choices.content: carving the jade with a stone
incising the jade with a metal tool

assessment_items.question_content: **Jade cong are examples of  [[☃ dropdown 1]] from [[☃ dropdown 2]].**
hints: The Neolithic Revolution that began around 10,000 B.C.E. marks the emergence of civilizations around the world.
The Liangzhu culture in China produced numerous jade cong.

assessment_items.question_content:
**What motif is commonly found on Chinese jade cong?**

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints:
No written sources from the Liangzhu culture have been found to explain the significance of Chinese cong.
Fine repeated lines create face-like shapes on many cong.

assessment_items.question_content:
**Based on symbolism in later Chinese culture, which element of this jade cong may have be associated with the heavens?**



![](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/84e0681986f16616d0b3cdf3e4046ad2.jpeg)

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints: While no evidence exists to confirm the symbolism in ancient Chinese cong, later objects employed circular forms as symbols of the heavenly realm.

assessment_items.question_content:
**Which of the following statements are true?**

![](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/798ca63430352cfb9b35324aafdfb559.jpeg)

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints: Found in graves, jade cong probably held cultural significance for the Liangzhu culture, but no written evidence confirms their exact purpose or meaning. And Jade cong were *NOT* used to hold rice grown near the Yangzi River in China.

choices.content: Jade cong have been found in graves of the Liangzhu culture.
The symbolic imagery of jade cong suggest they held cultural significance.
Jade cong were used to hold rice grown near the Yangzi River in China.
Written inscriptions on jade cong provide evidence of their symbolic meaning.

assessment_items.question_content:
**What about this jade cong could support the interpretation that it reflects timeless human concerns? **

![](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/d64c3f821eea405521ae14cfb2b0b001.jpeg)

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints: All of the answers are correct.

choices.content: The forms are similar to symbols in subsequent Chinese art.
The possible reference to human, animal, or spirit figures.
The time and skilled labor used to create the object.
The discovery of jade cong buried in graves.
